name: Adjustment of Overpayment of Estimated Income Tax by Corporation

eligibility.description: The overpayment must be at least 10% of the expected tax liability and at least $500. Application must be filed by the 15th day of the 4th month after year-end.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Corporations can apply for a ‘quick refund’ of estimated tax overpayments after the close of the taxable year but before filing their tax return.
